creator: uffe@uffe.org
text:
archivers/unadf patch - updating it to newest release (0.7.12)

I would like to maintain this port in the future.

Patch description:

Existing 3 patch files in the 'files' directory should be removed - the patch reduces them to empty files - that was the best way that I could represent file deletions through a patch/diff

New patch files in the 'files' directory are represented as a diff from /dev/null
